# OSS Labs - Full Documentation for LLMs

## Overview

OSS Labs is a small group of engineers building and maintaining open source
developer tools and infrastructure. We focus on problems we understand deeply:
reproducible environments, cross-language memory, and clean API design.

Founded as Open Vanguard (name transition in progress), OSS Labs operates under
the domain ossl.dev. The GitHub organization is github.com/ossl-dev.

## Mission

We build open source tools that solve real problems. Each project exists because
someone needed it badly enough to build it. No investors, no growth targets,
no enterprise sales pipeline. Just good work, done carefully, in public.

## How We Work

1. Solve real problems. We do not chase trends or rewrite things because a new
   framework dropped. Every project exists to fix something we hit ourselves.

2. Small is a feature. We prefer libraries that do one thing well over frameworks
   that do everything adequately. Less code means fewer bugs, faster reviews,
   simpler upgrades.

3. Review is where the work happens. Patient, thorough code review produces
   better software than clever initial implementations. Good reviewers are as
   valuable as good authors.

4. Earn the keys. Write code, review PRs, help with issues. Do that consistently
   and thoughtfully, and you get commit access. No politics, no gatekeeping.

## Projects

### genesis
- URL: https://github.com/ossl-dev/genesis
- Language: TypeScript
- Description: Declarative, cross-platform developer environment provisioning
  engine. Define your toolchain, SDKs, and config as code. One command to
  recreate the exact same environment everywhere.
- Topics: developer-tools, devops, dx, cross-platform

### zinc
- URL: https://zinc.ossl.dev
- Language: Rust
- Description: Universal Shared Memory. A high-performance shared memory
  library in Rust with bindings for C, Python, Node, and Go. Zero-copy data
  sharing across language boundaries.
- Topics: memory, systems, cross-language, ffi

### pylon
- URL: https://github.com/ossl-dev/pylon
- Language: TypeScript
- Description: Dead simple API versioning. Works with Express, Fastify, Hono,
  and anything middleware-shaped. Clean routing, minimal overhead, no codebase
  restructuring required.
- Topics: api, versioning, backend, http

## Website

- Domain: https://ossl.dev
- Built with: SvelteKit (fully static generation)
- Package manager: Bun
- Pages: Home, Projects, About, Blog

## Community

- GitHub Organization: https://github.com/ossl-dev
- All projects welcome contributors. Good contributions get noticed.
  Good contributors get commit access.
